symptom: a foot that stepped through a stray board on site and will not stop throbbing
hook: a long metal spike had driven straight through the foot between two bones
whatYouSee: A long metal nail driven straight through the soft tissue of the foot between two bones.
whyItMatters: A puncture this deep can carry bacteria straight into the joint or bone and turn a simple step into a serious infection risk.
treatment: Pull the spike and clean the wound and cover tetanus and start antibiotics because deep punctures infect easily.
takeaway: The floor does not forgive a wrong step.
igOptions: B. A nail embedded through the foot

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with a foot that stepped through a stray board on site and will not stop throbbing.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And a long metal spike had driven straight through the foot between two bones.

Case #83 🩻 Difficulty 1/5

Medics: your diagnosis?

Everyone else: What would you do if this happened to you?

Answer in 45 min 👀 no spoilers from me till then
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Nail embedded in the foot

👀 What you see:
A long metal nail driven straight through the soft tissue of the foot between two bones.

🦴 Why it matters:
A puncture this deep can carry bacteria straight into the joint or bone and turn a simple step into a serious infection risk.

💊 Treatment:

Pull the spike and clean the wound and cover tetanus and start antibiotics because deep punctures infect easily.
